query:
WITH user_data AS (
            SELECT pcd_status, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM age(CURRENT_DATE, date_of_birth)) as age 
            FROM users WHERE id = $1
        )
        SELECT s.id 
        FROM spots s, user_data u
        WHERE s.status = 'free'
          AND (
              (u.pcd_status = true AND s.id IN ('A-01', 'A-02'))
              OR 
              (u.age >= 60 AND s.id IN ('A-03', 'A-04'))
          )
        ORDER BY s.id
        LIMIT 1
